Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class ReliefScenario.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ReliefScenario.Builder
Enclosing class:
ReliefScenario
public static final class ReliefScenario.Builder extends Object
Builder for ReliefScenario.

    compressibility(double compressibility)
    Sets the relieving-fluid compressibility factor Z.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    credible(boolean credible)
    Sets whether the scenario is credible and eligible for governing-case selection.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    densityKgPerM3(double densityKgPerM3)
    Sets the relieving-fluid density (used for liquid relief volume-flow conversion).
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    dynamicallyDetermined(boolean dynamicallyDetermined)
    Sets whether the relief rate was determined by dynamic simulation.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    gasDensityKgPerM3(double gasDensityKgPerM3)
    Sets the inlet gas density for two-phase relief sizing.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    gasMassFraction(double gasMassFraction)
    Sets the inlet gas (vapour) mass fraction for two-phase relief sizing.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    latentHeatJPerKg(double latentHeatJPerKg)
    Sets the latent heat of vaporization used for fire and flashing two-phase relief.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    liquidDensityKgPerM3(double liquidDensityKgPerM3)
    Sets the inlet liquid density for two-phase relief sizing.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK(double liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK)
    Sets the liquid heat capacity used for the two-phase omega method.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    molarMassKgPerMol(double molarMassKgPerMol)
    Sets the relieving-fluid molar mass.
    ReliefScenario.Builder

    standardReference(String standardReference)
    Overrides the governing standard reference.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    viscosityPaS(double viscosityPaS)
    Sets the relieving-liquid dynamic viscosity (used for the API 520 liquid viscosity correction).

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(String name, ReliefCause cause)
      Creates a builder for a relief scenario.
      Parameters:
      name - the scenario name; not null
      cause - the overpressure cause; not null

  • Method Details

    • phase

      public ReliefScenario.Builder phase(ReliefPhase phase)
      Sets the relieving phase.
      Parameters:
      phase - the relief phase
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • reliefRateKgPerS

      public ReliefScenario.Builder reliefRateKgPerS(double reliefRateKgPerS)
      Sets the required relief rate.
      Parameters:
      reliefRateKgPerS - the relief rate in kg/s
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • reliefTemperatureK

      public ReliefScenario.Builder reliefTemperatureK(double reliefTemperatureK)
      Sets the relieving temperature.
      Parameters:
      reliefTemperatureK - the relieving temperature in K
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • molarMassKgPerMol

      public ReliefScenario.Builder molarMassKgPerMol(double molarMassKgPerMol)
      Sets the relieving-fluid molar mass.
      Parameters:
      molarMassKgPerMol - the molar mass in kg/mol
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • compressibility

      public ReliefScenario.Builder compressibility(double compressibility)
      Sets the relieving-fluid compressibility factor Z.
      Parameters:
      compressibility - the compressibility factor (dimensionless)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • specificHeatRatio

      public ReliefScenario.Builder specificHeatRatio(double specificHeatRatio)
      Sets the relieving-fluid specific-heat ratio Cp/Cv.
      Parameters:
      specificHeatRatio - the specific-heat ratio (dimensionless)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • densityKgPerM3

      public ReliefScenario.Builder densityKgPerM3(double densityKgPerM3)
      Sets the relieving-fluid density (used for liquid relief volume-flow conversion).
      Parameters:
      densityKgPerM3 - the density in kg/m3
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • viscosityPaS

      public ReliefScenario.Builder viscosityPaS(double viscosityPaS)
      Sets the relieving-liquid dynamic viscosity (used for the API 520 liquid viscosity correction).
      Parameters:
      viscosityPaS - the viscosity in Pa*s
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • gasMassFraction

      public ReliefScenario.Builder gasMassFraction(double gasMassFraction)
      Sets the inlet gas (vapour) mass fraction for two-phase relief sizing.
      Parameters:
      gasMassFraction - the gas mass fraction (0-1)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • gasDensityKgPerM3

      public ReliefScenario.Builder gasDensityKgPerM3(double gasDensityKgPerM3)
      Sets the inlet gas density for two-phase relief sizing.
      Parameters:
      gasDensityKgPerM3 - the gas density in kg/m3
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • liquidDensityKgPerM3

      public ReliefScenario.Builder liquidDensityKgPerM3(double liquidDensityKgPerM3)
      Sets the inlet liquid density for two-phase relief sizing.
      Parameters:
      liquidDensityKgPerM3 - the liquid density in kg/m3
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • latentHeatJPerKg

      public ReliefScenario.Builder latentHeatJPerKg(double latentHeatJPerKg)
      Sets the latent heat of vaporization used for fire and flashing two-phase relief.
      Parameters:
      latentHeatJPerKg - the latent heat in J/kg
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK

      public ReliefScenario.Builder liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK(double liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK)
      Sets the liquid heat capacity used for the two-phase omega method.
      Parameters:
      liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK - the liquid heat capacity in J/(kg*K)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • dynamicallyDetermined

      public ReliefScenario.Builder dynamicallyDetermined(boolean dynamicallyDetermined)
      Sets whether the relief rate was determined by dynamic simulation.
      Parameters:
      dynamicallyDetermined - true if dynamically determined
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • credible

      public ReliefScenario.Builder credible(boolean credible)
      Sets whether the scenario is credible and eligible for governing-case selection.
      Parameters:
      credible - true if credible
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • standardReference

      public ReliefScenario.Builder standardReference(String standardReference)
      Overrides the governing standard reference. When not set, the reference from the cause is used.
      Parameters:
      standardReference - the standard reference string
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • addAssumption

      public ReliefScenario.Builder addAssumption(String assumption)
      Adds a single assumption string.
      Parameters:
      assumption - the assumption to record
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • assumptions

      public ReliefScenario.Builder assumptions(List<String> assumptionList)
      Adds all assumption strings from a collection.
      Parameters:
      assumptionList - the assumptions to record; may be null
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • build

      public ReliefScenario build()
      Builds the immutable relief scenario.
      Returns:
      a new ReliefScenario
